'''Arrizza''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Kurtzen]] healer from [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]], who in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]] helped [[Tahiri Veila]] deal with her increasingly-dominant [[Yuuzhan Vong]] personality. He was a friend of the [[Ryn/Legends|Ryn]] [[Goure Conor]], who also was also a worker employed underneath the city of [[Salis D'aar/Legends|Salis D'aar]].

{{Char-stub}}

*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]'' {{1st}}
